title: No Escape
description: I'm adding a VERY HORROR MOD that will be developed step by step :)
body:
This is a mod that will be developed step by step. The mod is meant to make people fear that something is constantly following them...


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

There's a chance the Demon will appear in the mod...
There's also a chance we'll get cards in the mod.
The mod will be developed step by step.
The demon is meant to terrify people that someone is constantly watching them. The demon appears during raids.
The cards are meant to be something that constantly reminds people that they are not alone.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Info</summary>

The mod will be developed step by step. So you can expect the full version of the mod to be VERY HORROR-FUL.

</details>

Have fun playing :))))))
